ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the individual */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the individual */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the individual is located */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual being predicted */,
  "predicted_ethnicity_1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first predicted ethnicity */,
  "predicted_ethnicity_1_score" REAL /* Probability score of the first predicted ethnicity */,
  "predicted_ethnicity_2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second predicted ethnicity */,
  "predicted_ethnicity_2_score" REAL /* Probability score of the second predicted ethnicity */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the predictions */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_ethnicity_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_ethnicity_2_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_ethnicity_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_ethnicity_1_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnicity */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Geographical origin of the ethnicity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the ethnicity data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual who responded */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was taken */,
  "response_data" TEXT /* Data collected from the survey in JSON format */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "survey_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the survey */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the survey response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., government, private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the source data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the user data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, data download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES analyst_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report in detailed format */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., demographic, market segmentation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES analyst_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the compliance check */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for the compliance check */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken as a result of the compliance check */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the compliance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analyzers" (
  "analyzer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of how it works */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used in the analytical method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytical method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyzer_id")
)
